title: query_status.output
description: Output of query_status per ADR-0039 §3 — { status, lastActivityAt, busyOnThread? }.

status.description: Lifecycle status (e.g. ready, busy, stopped, error).

lastActivityAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the target's most recent activity. Null when the target has never produced activity.

busyOnThread.description: Thread id the target is currently busy on, or null when idle.
